description_long: This is a large, concrete skateboarding half-pipe structure with a weathered, rust-colored surface and prominent graffiti art, including peace symbols and hand signs. The half-pipe features high vertical walls, a central open section, and a staircase with metal railings leading to a raised platform at one end. Metal guardrails run along the top edges for safety, and the structure is adorned with colorful, urban-style murals. The open central section allows for visibility and access, while the stairway and platform provide a vantage point or starting area for users. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for public parks or urban recreational spaces.
description: A large, graffiti-decorated concrete skateboarding half-pipe with metal railings, a stairway, and a raised platform, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the half-pipe, graffiti art, and the stairway with railings on the left.
description_view_1: Angled view from above, highlighting the interior curve of the half-pipe, the stairway, and the open platform area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the large peace symbol graffiti, the open central section, and the stairway structure.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, showing the depth of the half-pipe, both side walls, and the stairway with platform.
